_comment: Sequential pipeline queue. One at a time. AUTO-APPROVE MODE ENABLED 2026-05-20: Robert has pre-approved all pipelines. Dry-run then immediately commit — no approval ping needed. Send one final Telegram after full commit: 'P{n} {Name} done: {X} laws committed. Starting P{n+1} {Next} now.'
_instructions: Set status to 'running' when starting. Run dry-run, log count, then immediately run full commit without asking for approval. Mark 'done' after DB commit confirmed. Read next 'pending' entry and start it. Skip 'blocked' entries.

queue.name: Jamaica
queue.notes: Shipped 2026-05-20. 528 acts across years 2000–2023 via DataTables AJAX.

queue.name: Sri Lanka
queue.source_alt: https://www.lawnet.gov.lk/ (parked — returns 'root directory' only; mybluehost cert. Use documents.gov.lk Department of Government Printing instead)
queue.notes: Shipped 2026-05-20. 1,704 acts 1981–2026 from Dept. of Government Printing static HTML tables. 100% DAY-precision dates; English/Sinhala/Tamil PDF links captured in metadata.

queue.name: Pakistan
queue.block_reason: Probed 2026-05-20: www.pakistancode.gov.pk, molaw.gov.pk, senate.gov.pk, na.gov.pk all TCP-timeout from this network (geo-blocked or hard down). supremecourt.gov.pk returns 403. No reachable .gov.pk legal portal available. Skipped per task protocol; revisit when alternate route (VPN/mirror) is found.
queue.notes: Pakistan Code consolidated statute book. ~900+ federal acts in English from colonial era to present. Use pakistancode.gov.pk NOT na.gov.pk (which was geo-blocked). No API — scrape act list.

queue.name: Uruguay
queue.notes: Cleanest LatAm structure. IMPO (Centro de Información Oficial). URL pattern: /bases/leyes/{number}-{year} (DASH not slash). Sequential scan 16100-20400. In progress 2026-05-20.

queue.name: Peru
queue.notes: Shipped 2026-05-20. 5,202 laws 1990–2025 from leyes.congreso.gob.pe month-by-month POST search. Types: LEY, RESOLUCION LEGISLATIVA, DECRETO LEY. DAY-precision dates. 437 months fetched.

queue.name: PacLII — Pacific Islands
queue.notes: paclii.org Cloudflare-protected — direct blocked. Strategy: enumerate slugs via Wayback CDX API, fetch act pages from Wayback Machine, parse <title> tag. CDX confirmed counts: fj=269, sb=191, vu=329, to=178, ws=320, ki=126, tv=120, pg=252. Countries: Fiji, Solomon Islands, Vanuatu, Tonga, Samoa, Kiribati, Tuvalu, Papua New Guinea. Nauru/Cook Islands have 0/1 acts in CDX. Dry-run in progress 2026-05-20.

queue.name: Trinidad and Tobago
queue.notes: Shipped 2026-05-20. 368 consolidated chapter laws from Ministry of Legal Affairs Apache index. 27 chapter pages, 367 with 2018-12-05 PDF mtimes. claimEmergedAt = PDF Last-Modified (consolidated revision date).

queue.name: Brunei
queue.notes: Shipped 2026-05-20. 288 Cap-numbered Acts from AGC BRULAW A–Y pages (90.3% with date-coming-into-force). Per-act detail-page URLs captured for 97.9%.

queue.name: Turkey
queue.notes: Use the unofficial internal API reverse-engineered by mevzuat-mcp (github.com/saidsurucu/mevzuat-mcp). Search endpoint: POST to mevzuat.gov.tr. Scope to KANUN (laws) type only for first pass. Turkish text — translation downstream.

queue.name: UAE
queue.notes: Shipped 2026-05-20. 177 laws from uaelegislation.gov.ae via Wayback CDX enumeration (178 IDs found, 1 had no title). Cloudflare bypass via Wayback Machine fetches.

queue.name: Costa Rica
queue.block_reason: Probed 2026-05-20. Direct access: HTTP 000 (connection timeout). Wayback CDX has only 368 random individual law text pages archived (nrm_texto_completo.aspx), not a systematic enumeration. No searchable law index in Wayback. Law names buried in full text body, not a clean title field. Not viable without direct site access.

post_batch.name: Wikidata Political Context Enrichment
post_batch.notes: Idempotent — backfills PoliticalContext (HoG, party) for all unenriched legislative sources via Wikidata SPARQL. Safe to re-run. Run once after each legislative batch. All new pipeline tags added to registry 2026-05-20.

blocked.name: Laws.Africa (9 African countries)
blocked.reason: Awaiting research access approval. Email sent to Laws.Africa 2026-05-20. Once approved, builds all 9 countries in one pass via REST API v3.

blocked.name: New Zealand
blocked.reason: Awaiting API key from contact@pco.govt.nz. Email sent 2026-05-20.

blocked.name: Russia
blocked.reason: Geo-blocked. Script ran 2026-05-20 but hit 403s from page 31+ onward. 4,335 laws 'found' but 0 committed to DB — content fetches failed due to 403s. 1,712/2,648 pages blocked. Process killed after stalling at page 2,400 with no new data.
blocked.revisit: Needs Russian IP or mirror source (e.g. pravo.gov.ru via proxy, or a third-party aggregator).

blocked.name: Pakistan
blocked.reason: All .gov.pk legal portals geo-blocked 2026-05-20: pakistancode.gov.pk, molaw.gov.pk, senate.gov.pk, na.gov.pk all TCP-timeout. supremecourt.gov.pk returns 403.
blocked.revisit: Needs Pakistani IP or VPN exit node. ~900+ English acts available at pakistancode.gov.pk once accessible.
